title: McCarthy Tétrault adds senior litigator Valerie Prather, expands market-leading dispute resolution capacity in Alberta
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault adds senior litigator Valerie Prather, expands market-leading dispute resolution capacity in Alberta
We are pleased to welcome Valerie Prather to McCarthy Tétrault as a Partner in our Calgary Litigation and Dispute Resolution Group. With a distinguished track record as a litigator, Valerie brings exceptional advocacy skills and deep industry knowledge to our clients across Alberta and Western Canada.
Her arrival significantly enhances our ability to deliver strategic, effective dispute resolution services in the region. With three decades of experience and a Band 1 ranking from Chambers and Partners, Valerie is widely recognized for representing clients in high-stakes litigation and regulatory proceedings. She joins us from another nationally ranked business law firm, further strengthening our capacity to serve clients seeking experienced counsel on complex and challenging issues.
“Valerie is a standout litigator whose expertise as lead counsel at all levels of court complements our national platform,” said Brett Anderson , Regional Managing Partner for Calgary. “Her addition reinforces our ability to provide clients with sophisticated, practical solutions in complex disputes.”
Tom Sutton , National Litigation and Dispute Resolution Practice Group Leader , added: “Valerie’s reputation for excellence and her Chambers recognition speak volumes. She deepens our bench strength and enhances the value we deliver to clients across Canada.”
“I’m thrilled to join McCarthy Tétrault and work alongside a team that shares my commitment to client-focused advocacy,” said Valerie . “The Firm’s collaborative culture and national reach create an ideal environment to continue delivering exceptional results for clients.”
Valerie earned her LLB from the University of Calgary and was called to the Alberta Bar in 1989. She is a King’s Counsel, a Fellow of the American College of Trial Lawyers, and recipient of the Women in Law Leadership Award for Leadership in Private Practice. In 2025, she was awarded the King Charles III Coronation Medal for her significant contributions to the community. She is consistently ranked among Canada’s leading litigators by Chambers Canada , Benchmark Litigation , and Lexpert .
Read more about Valerie and how she can support your organization.
McCarthy Tétrault's Litigation and Dispute Resolution Group gets to the heart of the real business issues, manages matters with objectivity and clarity and buffers your company against disruption. We do not waste time or reputation on pointless posturing. We seek satisfactory resolution or a successful outcome in court. Major businesses count on McCarthy Tétrault when they confront complex disputes, whether in Canada or internationally. Through our offices across Canada, we provide all the resources needed to handle complex and multijurisdictional disputes in either official language. Learn how our team can help you .

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, advising on large and complex assignments for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has a substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London, UK.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact media@mccarthy.ca
- Valerie  Prather Partner People.Offices.Singular Calgary
